title: BEM-866 inspect smoke workflow
objective:
Run script:
"""
f = Path('.github/workflows/claude_code_action_smoke.yml')
text = f.read_text(encoding='utf-8', errors='ignore') if f.exists() else ''
lines = text.splitlines()
outdir = Path('governance/runtime/curator_dispatch/bem866_smoke_workflow_lines')
outdir.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
count = 0
for i, line in enumerate(lines, 1):
    low = line.lower()
    if i <= 120 or any(tok in low for tok in ['workflow_dispatch', 'inputs:', 'trace', 'task', 'mailbox', 'commit', 'push', 'from_claude', 'run:', 'uses:']):
        safe = ''.join(ch if ch.isalnum() else '_' for ch in line.strip())[:140] or 'blank'
        marker = outdir / (str(i).zfill(4) + '_' + safe + '.md')
        marker.write_text('# BEM-866 smoke workflow line\nLine: ' + str(i) + '\nText: ' + line + '\n', encoding='utf-8')
        changed_files.append(str(marker))
        count += 1
summary = Path('governance/runtime/curator_dispatch/BEM866_SMOKE_WORKFLOW_LINES_INDEX.md')
summary.write_text('# BEM-866 smoke workflow lines\nExists: ' + str(f.exists()) + '\nLines marked: ' + str(count) + '\n', encoding='utf-8')
changed_files.append(str(summary))
ops_applied.append('inspected claude_code_action_smoke workflow lines: ' + str(count))
"""
No issue comments.
